The '''Anywhere Room''' was a popular tourist attraction, and the most popular of [[Hologram Fun World]]'s features. The small building contained [[Hologram/Legends|holograms]] of every known [[Planet/Legends|planet]] and could take visitors to holographic representations of places such as [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]], [[Sittana]], and the [[Emperor's throne room]].

{{Struct-stub}}
